examples: The electrogalvanizing zinc plate were greatly increased under the irradiation of an iodinetungsten lamp.
All of this drives advocates of irradiation crazy.
Irradiation leaves no traces of radioactive material in food.
Several years ago regulators finally permitted irradiation of pork, poultry, fruits, vegetables, spices and grains.
Now the Department of Agriculture has grudgingly announced that it will allow irradiation of red meat.
